mapper.sql: tjg.dept_id, tjg.process, tjg.job_name, tjg.job_id, tjg.job_level, tjg.work_content, tjg.enabled_flag, tjg.dept_name, tjg.team_name, tjg.id, tjg.create_time, tjg.create_by, tjg.update_time, tjg.update_by,certification_job

${tAlias}.dept_id as ${tAlias}_dept_id, ${tAlias}.process as ${tAlias}_process, ${tAlias}.job_name as ${tAlias}_job_name, ${tAlias}.job_id as ${tAlias}_job_id, ${tAlias}.job_level as ${tAlias}_job_level, ${tAlias}.work_content as ${tAlias}_work_content, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.dept_name as ${tAlias}_dept_name, ${tAlias}.team_name as ${tAlias}_team_name, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by
mapper.insert: insert into td_job_grading (dept_id, process, job_name, job_id, job_level, work_content, enabled_flag, dept_name, team_name, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by,certification_job) values ( #{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{process,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{jobLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{teamName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{certificationJob,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: update td_job_grading set dept_id = #{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, process = #{process,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, job_name = #{jobName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},certification_job = #{certificationJob,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, job_id = #{jobId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, job_level = #{jobLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, work_content = #{workContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, dept_name = #{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, team_name = #{teamName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select count(*) from td_job_grading where job_name = #{jobName} and certification_job = #{certificationJob} and dept_id = #{deptId}
